violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen (2 sinks) or at bars. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023
The tile flooring in the kitchen (production line) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
